hero.question: Will Bitcoin reach $120,000 by December 31, 2026?
hero.prob_take: Bitcoin bulls got aggressive overnight, pushing odds up 8.5 points as spot prices rallied and leverage traders sensed momentum into year-end, but the 17.5% price already discounts a 2.6x move in 24 months which feels generous given macro headwinds and the historical difficulty of sustained 6-figure crypto rallies. Watch Q1 2025 Fed policy and institutional inflows closely, this one's fairly priced until we see sustained >$70k support that suggests real conviction about the $120k target.

daily_take.headline: Bitcoin's $120K Shot Gets Real: Market Repricing 2026 Rally Odds
daily_take.deck: Bitcoin's 2026 moonshot odds jumped 8.5 points to 17.5% in 24 hours, signaling real money flowing into the bet. At $458K volume, this isn't noise. The market's pricing in a 155% rally from here by end of 2026. That's optimistic but not insane if macro shifts or institutional adoption accelerates. Smart bettors should ask: is this catching up to late-cycle momentum, or are we front-running the next washout?
